what_moved:
FACT: Macro regime is risk_on with loose financial conditions (NFCI -0.4), fed funds at 3.8%, 10-year at 4.3%, and a steepening curve at +51 bps.

FACT: Portfolio NAV stands at $6,862 across 10 positions, with ETH at 29.2% allocation ($2,001) approaching the 30% concentration limit.

FACT: DeFi valuation dispersion remains extreme: wstETH trades at 5.2x earnings versus peer mid of 17.5x (236% upside to peer), while ENA sits at 878.2x and VIRTUAL at 96.5x.

INFERENCE: The macro setup (positive curve, loose conditions) supports risk assets, but the valuation gap between cheapest and most expensive DeFi names suggests selective positioning matters more than beta exposure.
risks_today:
FACT: ETH is 29.2% of NAV, approaching the 30% concentration limit with 0.8% headroom. The portfolio holds 10 positions with total NAV of $6,862.

FACT: One info-level alert is active: "ETH approaching concentration limit" (created 2026-04-10, citing ETH at 27.8% of NAV, though the top_positions data shows 29.2%).

FACT: LDO has a high-impact governance proposal (ai_impact_score 8) to authorize a one-time LDO accumulation program using up to 10,000 stETH from the Lido DAO Treasury, with voting ending 2026-04-13T16:00:00.000Z.

INFERENCE: The discrepancy between the alert metric (27.8%) and the current top_positions allocation (29.2%) suggests ETH concentration has increased since the alert was generated, reducing margin to the limit.
decisions_this_week:

INFERENCE: This deserves review before the close date given potential impact on LDO token supply and treasury allocation.
